# Information Technology

Established 2010

[Faculty](/departments/it/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To excel in information technology education and create professionals who drive digital transformation.

### Mission

* Deliver quality education in information technology and systems
* Promote research in cloud computing, IoT, and mobile technologies
* Develop industry-ready IT professionals with practical skills
* Foster innovation and entrepreneurship in IT sector

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Information Technology

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 60

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Programming Lab
* Web Technology Lab
* Mobile App Development Lab
* Cloud Computing Lab
* IoT Lab
* Database Lab
